title: 'We need to replace Bill Simmons': SHA resident calls for accountability
summary: Syracuse Housing Authority (SHA) resident Mable Wilson publicly called for the replacement of Executive Director Bill Simmons, citing poor treatment of residents and lack of accountability. Mayor Walsh has expressed lack of confidence in SHA leadership and stated the need for change, though termination authority rests with the SHA Board of Commissioners. This escalates ongoing scrutiny of SHA management following reports on the paused Children Rising Center project.

political_signal.description: Resident advocacy for executive leadership removal, amplified by mayoral scrutiny. Mayor has publicly stated need for change but defers to board authority.

processing_notes: Article references prior I-Team reporting on SHA and Children Rising Center project paused status; suggests part of ongoing investigation
Mayor's position signals political pressure but formal decision authority remains with board structure
No financial data or specific remediation timeline mentioned
